title: onychium robustum
intro: Onychium robustum, also known as the Rock Rue, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Onychium robustum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various health conditions.
